---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use case
Who would benefit from this and how? (e.g. students learning G-code, machinists validating toolpaths, etc.)

## Mockups / References
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other tools.

## Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots here.
